entries.name: Improved Flash Heal
entries.desc: Increases healing done by Flash Heal by 15%.

entries.name: Angelic Feather
entries.desc: Places a feather at the target location, granting the first ally to walk through it 40% increased movement speed for 5 sec. Only 3 feathers can be placed at one time.

entries.name: Holy Fire
entries.desc: Consumes the enemy in Holy flames that cause 1,166 Holy damage and an additional 421 Holy damage over 7 sec.

entries.name: Holy Nova
entries.desc: An explosion of holy light around you deals up to 152 Holy damage to enemies and up to 122 healing to allies within 12 yds, reduced if there are more than 5 targets.

entries.name: Dispel Magic
entries.desc: Dispels Magic on the enemy target, removing 1 beneficial Magic effect.

entries.name: Spiritual Guidance
entries.desc: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

entries.name: Psychic Scream
entries.desc: Lets out a psychic scream, causing all enemies within 8 yards to flee, disorienting them for 8 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect.

entries.name: Lightburst
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Holy Nova by 400%, its healing by 500%, and its cooldown by 30 sec.

entries.name: Leap of Faith
entries.desc: Pulls the spirit of a party or raid member, instantly moving them directly in front of you.

entries.name: Improved Purify
entries.desc: Purify additionally removes all Disease effects.

entries.name: Power Infusion
entries.desc:
Infuses the target with power for 15 sec, increasing haste by 20%.

Can only be cast on players.

entries.name: Painful Invocation
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Shadow Word: Pain by 10%.

entries.name: Sheer Terror
entries.desc: Increases the amount of damage required to break your Psychic Scream by 25%.

entries.name: Petrifying Scream
entries.desc: Psychic Scream causes enemies to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

entries.name: Surge of Light
entries.desc: Your healing spells and Smite have a 8% chance to make your next Flash Heal instant and cost 50% less mana. Stacks to 2.

entries.name: Body and Soul
entries.desc: Power Word: Shield and Leap of Faith increase your target's movement speed by 40% for 3 sec.

entries.name: Mass Dispel
entries.desc: Dispels magic in a 15 yard radius, removing all harmful Magic from 5 friendly targets and 1 beneficial Magic effect from 5 enemy targets. Potent enough to remove Magic that is normally undispellable.

entries.name: Twins of the Sun Priestess
entries.desc:
Power Infusion also grants you its effect at 100% value when used on an ally. 

If no ally is targeted, it will grant its effect at 100% value to a nearby ally, preferring damage dealers.

entries.name: Strength of Resolve
entries.desc: Increases your Stamina by 6%.

entries.name: Mind Control
entries.desc: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 sec. Does not work versus Demonic, Undead, or Mechanical beings. Shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

entries.name: Dominate Mind
entries.desc: Controls a mind up to 1 level above yours for 30 sec while still controlling your own mind. Does not work versus Demonic, Mechanical, or Undead beings or players. This spell shares diminishing returns with other disorienting effects.

entries.name: Psychic Voice
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Psychic Scream by 10 sec.

entries.name: Void Tendrils
entries.desc: Call shadowy tendrils to constrict enemies when Psychic Scream ends, rooting them in place for 4 sec.

entries.name: Everlasting Light
entries.desc: Surge of Light occurs up to 50% more often based on your missing mana.

entries.name: Move with Grace
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Leap of Faith by 30 sec.

entries.name: Mental Agility
entries.desc: Reduces the mana cost of Purify and Mass Dispel by 50% and Dispel Magic by 10%.

entries.name: Twin Disciplines
entries.desc: Increases the damage and healing of your Holy and Shadow spells by 2%.

entries.name: Dark Enlightenment
entries.desc: Increases your haste by 3%.

entries.name: False Autonomy
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Mind Control and Dominate Mind against enemy creatures by 15 sec.

entries.name: Shackle Horror
entries.desc: Shackles an aberration or undead enemy for 50 sec, preventing all actions and movement. Damage will cancel the effect. Limit 1.

entries.name: Inspiration
entries.desc: Reduces your target's physical damage taken by 5% for 15 sec after a critical heal with Flash Heal or Penance.

entries.name: Binding Heals
entries.desc: 20% of Flash Heal healing on other targets also heals you.

entries.name: Shadow Word: Death
entries.desc:
A word of dark binding that inflicts 320 Shadow damage to your target. If your target is not killed by Shadow Word: Death, you take backlash damage equal to 5% of your maximum health.

Damage increased by 150% to targets below 20% health.

entries.name: Sanguine Teachings
entries.desc: Increases your Leech by 2%.

entries.name: Desperate Prayer
entries.desc: Increases maximum health by 25% for 10 sec, and instantly heals you for that amount.

entries.name: Twist of Fate
entries.desc: After damaging or healing a target below 35% health, gain 5% increased damage and healing for 8 sec.

entries.name: Tithe Evasion
entries.desc: Shadow Word: Death deals 50% less damage to you.

entries.name: Fade
entries.desc: Fade out, removing all your threat and reducing enemies' detection range against you for 10 sec.

entries.name: Angel's Mercy
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Desperate Prayer by 20 sec.

entries.name: Protective Light
entries.desc: Casting Flash Heal on yourself reduces all damage you take by 10% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Mindpierce
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Smite by 15%.

entries.name: Spectral Illusion
entries.desc: Fade creates an illusion of you for 4 sec, tricking enemies to attack it instead.

entries.name: Improved Fade
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Fade by 5 sec.

entries.name: Light's Inspiration
entries.desc: Increases the maximum health gained from Desperate Prayer by 10%.

entries.name: Unwavering Will
entries.desc: While above 75% health, the cast time of your Flash Heal, Prayer of Healing, and Smite are reduced by 5%.

entries.name: Spell Warding
entries.desc: Reduces all magic damage taken by 3%.

entries.name: Phantasm
entries.desc: Activating Fade removes all snare effects.

entries.name: Angelic Bulwark
entries.desc: When an attack brings you below 30% health, you gain an absorption shield equal to 25% of your maximum health for 20 sec. Cannot occur more than once every 90 sec.

entries.name: Benevolence
entries.desc: Increases the healing of your spells by 3%.

entries.name: Focused Power
entries.desc: Increases the damage of your spells by 3%.

entries.name: Phantom Reach
entries.desc: Increases the range of most spells by 15%.

entries.name: Translucent Image
entries.desc: Fade reduces damage you take by 10%.

entries.name: Holy Word: Serenity
entries.desc:
Perform a miracle, healing an ally for 6,948.

Cooldown reduced by 6 sec when you cast Flash Heal.

entries.name: Holy Word: Sanctify
entries.desc:
Releases miraculous light at a target location, healing up to 5 allies within 10 yds for 1,878.

Cooldown reduced by 6 sec when you cast Prayer of Healing.

entries.name: Guardian Spirit
entries.desc:
Calls upon a guardian spirit to watch over the friendly target for 10 sec, increasing healing received by 60%. If the target would die, the Spirit sacrifices itself and restores the target to 40% health.

Castable while stunned. Cannot save the target from massive damage.

entries.name: Holy Word: Chastise
entries.desc: Chastises the target for 1,449 Holy damage and incapacitates them for 4 sec.

entries.name: Prayer of Healing
entries.desc: A powerful prayer that heals your target and 4 injured allies within 40 yards for 2,203.

entries.name: Restitution
entries.desc: After Spirit of Redemption expires, you will revive at up to 100% health, based on your healing done during Spirit of Redemption. After reviving, you cannot benefit from Spirit of Redemption for 10 min.

entries.name: Guardian Angel
entries.desc:
When Guardian Spirit saves the target from death, it does not expire.

When Guardian Spirit expires without saving the target from death, reduce its remaining cooldown to 60 seconds.

entries.name: Censure
entries.desc: Holy Word: Chastise stuns the target for 4 sec and is not broken by damage.

entries.name: Empyreal Blaze
entries.desc:
Holy Word: Chastise causes your next 2 casts of Holy Fire to be instant, cost no mana, and incur no cooldown.

Refreshing Holy Fire on a target now extends its duration by 7 sec.

entries.name: Prayerful Litany
entries.desc: The primary target of Prayer of Healing is healed for 125% more.

entries.name: Cosmic Ripple
entries.desc: When Holy Word: Serenity or Holy Word: Sanctify finish their cooldown, you emit a burst of light that heals up to 5 injured targets within 40 yards for 466.

entries.name: Afterlife
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Spirit of Redemption by 50% and the range of its spells by 50%.

entries.name: Voice of Harmony
entries.desc:
Prayer of Mending reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Serenity by 4 sec.

Holy Fire reduces the cooldown of Holy Word: Chastise by 4 sec.

entries.name: Burning Vehemence
entries.desc:
Increases the damage of Holy Fire by 30%.

Holy Fire deals 75% of its initial damage to all nearby enemies within 12 yards of your target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Uplifting Words
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of your Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify by 10%.

entries.name: Cosmic Wave
entries.desc: Increases Cosmic Ripple healing by 15%.

entries.name: Divine Hymn
entries.desc:
Heals all party or raid members within 40 yards for 10,790 over 4.5 sec. Each heal increases all targets' healing taken by 4% for 15 sec, stacking.

Healing reduced beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Enlightenment
entries.desc: You regenerate mana 10% faster.

entries.name: Light's Resurgence
entries.desc:
Your Prayer of Mending has a 12% chance to leave a Renew on each target it heals.

 Renew
Fill the target with faith in the light, healing for 1,528 over 15 sec.

entries.name: Efficient Prayers
entries.desc: Reduces the mana cost of Prayer of Healing by 15%.

entries.name: Healing Focus
entries.desc: Reduces the mana cost of Flash Heal by 15%.

entries.name: Seraphic Crescendo
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Divine Hymn by 60 sec.

entries.name: Gales of Song
entries.desc: While channeling Divine Hymn, place 2 stacks of Prayer of Mending on up to 3 allies within its range every 0.9 sec.

entries.name: Divine Service
entries.desc: Prayer of Mending heals 4% more for each bounce remaining.

entries.name: Renewed Faith
entries.desc: Your healing on allies with your Renew is increased by 10%.

entries.name: Angelic Touch
entries.desc: Your healing spells critically strike for 220% of healing done instead of the usual 200%.

entries.name: Apotheosis
entries.desc: Reset the cooldown of your Holy Words, and enter a pure Holy form for 20 sec, increasing the cooldown reductions to your Holy Words by 200% and reducing their cost by 50%.

entries.name: Prayers of the Virtuous
entries.desc: Prayer of Mending jumps 2 additional times.

entries.name: Dispersing Light
entries.desc: 5% of healing done with Flash Heal is replicated to 4 injured allies within 40 yards.

entries.name: Trail of Light
entries.desc: 25% of healing done by Flash Heal is replicated to the previous target you healed with those spells.

entries.name: Miracle Worker
entries.desc: Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify gain an additional charge.

entries.name: Eternal Sanctity
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Apotheosis by 12 sec.

entries.name: Divinity
entries.desc:
Your healing is increased by 10% while Apotheosis is active.

Casting Apotheosis causes your next 3 Prayer of Healing casts to be instant and heal for 25% more.

entries.name: Holy Celerity
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of your Holy Words by 15 sec.

entries.name: Say Your Prayers
entries.desc: Prayer of Mending has a 15% chance to not consume a charge when it jumps to a new target.

entries.name: Crisis Management
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Flash Heal and Prayer of Healing by 15%.

entries.name: Light of the Naaru
entries.desc: The cooldowns of your Holy Words are reduced by an additional 10% when you cast the relevant spells.

entries.name: Light in the Darkness
entries.desc:
Increases the healing done by Holy Word: Serenity and Holy Word: Sanctify by 30%.

Increases the radius of Holy Word: Sanctify by 30%.

entries.name: Prismatic Echoes
entries.desc: Increases the healing done by your Mastery: Echo of Light by 5% and your Renew by 13%.

entries.name: Desperate Times
entries.desc: Increases healing by 10% on friendly targets at or below 50% health.

entries.name: Radiant Plea
entries.desc: Increases Prayer of Mending healing by 15%.

entries.name: Lightweaver
entries.desc:
Flash Heal reduces the cast time of your next Prayer of Healing within 20 sec by 30% and increases its healing done by 18%.

Can accumulate up to 4 charges.

entries.name: Ultimate Serenity
entries.desc:
Increases the healing done by Holy Word: Serenity by 10% and causes it to heal 4 nearby injured allies within 40 yards for 15% of its healing done.

Talents that affect Holy Word: Sanctify instead affect Holy Word: Serenity.

entries.name: Divine Image
entries.desc:
Your Holy Words summon an image of a Naaru at your side. For 9 sec, whenever you cast a healing or damaging spell, the Naaru will cast a similar spell.

If an image has already been summoned, that image is empowered instead.

entries.name: Lasting Words
entries.desc:
Holy Word: Serenity applies 12 sec of Renew to its target.

Holy Word: Sanctify applies 6 sec of Renew to allies it heals.

 Renew
Fill the target with faith in the light, healing for 1,223 over 12 sec.

entries.name: Epiphany
entries.desc: Your Holy Words have a 25% chance to cause your next cast of Prayer of Mending to ignore its cooldown.

entries.name: Benediction
entries.desc: Prayer of Mending healing has a chance to upgrade your next Flash Heal to Benediction, healing the target for 30% more and causing a Cosmic Ripple.

entries.name: Resonant Energy
entries.desc: Allies healed by your Halo receive 2% increased healing from you for 8 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Perfected Form
entries.desc: Your damage dealt is increased by 5% while Voidform is active.

entries.name: Energy Compression
entries.desc: Halo damage and healing is increased by 30%.

entries.name: Sustained Potency
entries.desc:
Creating a Halo extends the duration of Voidform by 1 sec. If Voidform is not active, up to 6 seconds is stored.

While out of combat or affected by a loss of control effect, the duration of Voidform is paused for up to 20 sec.

entries.name: Energy Conservation
entries.desc: Power Surge lasts an additional 5 sec.

entries.name: Power Surge
entries.desc: Casting Halo also causes you to create a Halo around you at 100% effectiveness every 5 sec for 10 sec.

entries.name: Energy Cycle
entries.desc: Casting Mind Flay: Insanity has a 100% chance to conjure Shadowy Apparitions.

entries.name: Shock Pulse
entries.desc: Halo damage reduces enemy movement speed by 5% for 5 sec, stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Incessant Screams
entries.desc: Psychic Scream creates an image of you at your location. After 4 sec, the image will let out a Psychic Scream.

entries.name: Empowered Surges
entries.desc: Your spells affected by Surge of Light heal for 5% more while Surge of Light is active.

entries.name: Halo
entries.desc: Creates a ring of Shadow energy around you that quickly expands to a 40 yd radius, healing allies for 600 and dealing 546 Shadow damage to enemies. Healing reduced beyond 6 targets.

entries.name: Manifested Power
entries.desc:
Creating a Halo grants Surge of Light.

 Surge of Light
Your healing spells and Smite have a 8% chance to make your next Flash Heal instant and cost 50% less mana. Stacks to 2.

entries.name: Divine Halo
entries.desc: Halo now centers around you and returns to you after it reaches its maximum distance, healing allies and damaging enemies each time it passes through them.

entries.name: Halo
entries.desc:
Creates a ring of Holy energy around you that quickly expands to a 40 yd radius, healing allies for 598 and dealing 558 Holy damage to enemies.

Healing reduced beyond 6 targets.

entries.name: Realized Potential
entries.desc: Shadow Word: Death damage increased by 25% and its cooldown is reduced by 3 sec.

entries.name: Spiritwell
entries.desc: Increases Shadowy Apparition damage by 10%.

entries.name: Word of Supremacy
entries.desc: Power Word: Fortitude grants you an additional 5% stamina.

entries.name: Heightened Alteration
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Dispersion by 2 sec.

entries.name: Focused Outburst
entries.desc: Void Volley damage increased by 15% and its cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

entries.name: Prompt Prognosis
entries.desc: Casting Prayer of Mending heals your target for 3,572.

entries.name: Preemptive Care
entries.desc: Increases the duration of your Renew by 40%.

entries.name: Divine Feathers
entries.desc:
Your Angelic Feathers increase movement speed by an additional 10%.

When an ally walks through your Angelic Feather, you are also granted 100% of its effect.

entries.name: Save the Day
entries.desc: For 6 sec after casting Leap of Faith you may cast it a second time for free, ignoring its cooldown.

entries.name: Waste No Time
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Prayer of Mending by 1.5 sec.

entries.name: Guiding Light
entries.desc: Prayer of Mending gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Twinsight
entries.desc: 3 additional Penance bolts are fired at an enemy within 40 yards when healing an ally with Penance, or fired at an ally within 40 yards when damaging an enemy with Penance.

entries.name: Foreseen Circumstances
entries.desc: Guardian Spirit lasts an additional 2 sec.

entries.name: Prophet's Will
entries.desc: Your Flash Heal and Holy Word: Serenity are 30% more effective when cast on yourself.

entries.name: Desperate Measures
entries.desc:
Desperate Prayer lasts an additional 10 sec.

Angelic Bulwark's absorption effect is increased by 15% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Assured Safety
entries.desc:
Casting Prayer of Mending applies Power Word: Shield to your target.

 Power Word: Shield
Shields an ally for 15 sec, absorbing 1,780 damage.

entries.name: Preventive Measures
entries.desc:
Increases the healing done by Prayer of Mending by 15%.

All damage dealt by Smite, Holy Fire and Holy Nova increased by 40%.

entries.name: Piety
entries.desc: 20% of overhealing done is redistributed to up to 4 nearby injured allies.

entries.name: Unfolding Vision
entries.desc: When Power Word: Shield or Void Shield expires with absorption remaining, it jumps to a nearby injured ally and loses 40% of its maximum absorb instead.

entries.name: Words of the Wise
entries.desc: Flash Heal, Plea, and Power Word: Radiance healing increased by 15%.

entries.name: Prophet's Insight
entries.desc: Atonement healing from Holy spells is increased by 15%.
